summary: Phase 2 end-to-end testing complete. Validated Monthly Summary, Compare Athletes, and Injuries (CRUD + context alert + seeded sample). Backend: 9/9 new tests passing (test_phase2_features.py). Frontend: all critical flows passed via Playwright against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Compare.jsx MetricRow: parseFloat('—') returns NaN→0 so highlight logic may mark both sides equal incorrectly when one athlete has insufficient data; consider skipping highlight when either value is '—'.
InjuriesPanel form does not validate that end_date >= start_date; could allow inconsistent records.
Seed/demo always wipes prior team/sessions/injuries for the user — by design but worth surfacing in UI (already labelled 'DADOS DEMO').
monthly_summary endpoint: when months span across years correctly handled; consider rejecting months<=0 or >24 with 400.
seed_data_creation: Used existing POST /api/seed/demo which now also inserts 3 sample injuries (João Silva Contratura/Lombar/low verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 verified. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_features.py and /app/backend/tests/test_futsal_api.py. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend Playwright flow: login → /resumo-mensal → /comparar (use option values from select to pick distinct athletes) → /atletas → click athlete → add/delete injury via injuries-panel. Note: Tailwind 'uppercase' CSS causes inner_text() to return 'LIGEIRA'/'GRAVE'/'ATIVA' — check against the uppercase form if asserting badge labels.

tested_features.monthly_summary: PASS — evolution headline 'SUBIU +38.7%', bar+line charts, 6-row delta table for João Silva.
tested_features.compare_two_athletes: PASS — VS header with names+positions+risk badges, side-by-side metrics, overlay ACWR chart with two coloured lines.
tested_features.compare_same_athlete_warning: PASS — warning ‘Selecione dois atletas diferentes.’ shown; comparison data hidden.
tested_features.injuries_seeded_joao: PASS — Contratura/Lombar/low (Ligeira) appears for João Silva.
tested_features.injury_create: PASS — type=Lesão muscular, body=Coxa esquerda, severity=high added, shows Grave + Ativa badges.
tested_features.injury_delete: PASS — deleted injury disappears immediately from list.
tested_features.injury_context_alert: PASS — visible on João Silva detail (recent ≤120 days).
tested_features.backend_monthly_endpoint: PASS — 6 months returned, delta_load_pct between consecutive months with data is mathematically correct.
tested_features.backend_compare_endpoint: PASS — returns both athletes + 60-day merged_series; unknown athlete → 404.
